mano_cua.result_summary: 发现Modal Focus Trap失效bug。Modal内3个可聚焦元素(×关闭/Close/Save Changes)，Tab从Save Changes后焦点逃逸到浏览器地址栏而非循环回×关闭按钮。重复测试2次均复现。焦点路径:×→Close→Save Changes→地址栏(bug)→×。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Confirmed focus trap bug. Tab from Save Changes escapes to browser address bar instead of cycling back to × close button. Reproduced twice consistently. Modal has 3 focusable elements but focus trap does not loop correctly.
